description:
Produce the design spec under docs/SPEC-forge-gated-delivery.md following the existing SPEC-*.md style (see docs/SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md and docs/SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md for shape and tone).

WHY: balls's invariants are currently distributed across README.md, SKILL.md, and the orphan-branch and lifecycle-sync SPECs. Forge-gated delivery touches the lifecycle, the config schema, and the plugin contract. Pinning the design in one doc before implementation lets reviewers (human or agent) check each impl ball against a single source of truth, and gives the BC story a place to live where it cannot rot.

Contents to cover:
- Goals and non-goals (e.g., we are NOT replacing the plugin issue-tracker model; forge plugins extend it).
- Config schema additions: delivery.mode ("local-squash" default | "deferred"), target_branch (default null = current branch at repo root, preserving today's implicit behavior), min_bl_version (advisory).
- Task schema additions: optional target_branch override on Task. New field on the JSON; serde lenient already → old bl ignores. Document write semantics on close: write delivered_in opportunistically when null.
- Lifecycle: bl review behavior under each delivery mode. Local-squash mode unchanged. Deferred mode: commit, push work branch, auto-create gate child via existing gates primitive, status=review, NO squash, NO delivered_in write.
- Lifecycle: bl close. In deferred mode the auto-gate blocks until the forge plugin (or human) closes the gate child. On close, if delivered_in is null, run the tag-scan from delivery.rs against target_branch to populate the hint.
- Forge plugin contract: extends existing plugin protocol. push for a deferred-mode review task opens/updates PR; sync polls PR state and closes gate children when merged.
- Backward-compat audit: walk through every scenario (old bl reading new state, old bl running create/claim/review/close on deferred-mode repo, mixed-version sync). Spell out which scenarios are safe and which are the accepted caveat.
- Test surface (mirrors docs/SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md §"integration suite must have").

This ball blocks the impl balls below; once the spec is merged, claim parallelism opens up.
title: Write docs/SPEC-forge-gated-delivery.md
